summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification for 10 listed PRs. No GitHub mutations are recommended. Security-sensitive/token/exec-boundary items are routed to central security handling; closed candidates are kept closed; the remaining open PRs are kept as independent backlog/maintainer-review items rather than deduped or closed.
